title: chore(deps): update dependency rollup to v1.2.3
body:
This PR contains the following updates:

| Package | Type | Update | Change | References |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| rollup | devDependencies | patch | `1.2.1` -> `1.2.3` | [source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>rollup/rollup</summary>

### [`v1.2.3`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​123)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.2.2...v1.2.3)

_2019-02-23_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Use correct path when rendering dynamic imports where the entry module is empty ([#​2714](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2714))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2714](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2714): Properly render dynamic imports when imported module is empty ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

### [`v1.2.2`](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md#​122)

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/compare/v1.2.1...v1.2.2)

_2019-02-19_

##### Bug Fixes

-   Fix wrong external imports when using the `paths` options only for some outputs ([#​2706](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/issues/2706))

##### Pull Requests

-   [#​2706](https://togithub.com/rollup/rollup/pull/2706): Always recreate paths for external modules ([@​lukastaegert](https://togithub.com/lukastaegert))

</details>
